title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・暗雲、じゃない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky finishes the spring Tenno Sho and
confirms that Special Week has improved even
more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How is she supposed to continue competing when
her talented opponents just keep getting better
and better?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me there's something she wants to find
out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, she decides to race in the Takarazuka
Kinen against Special Week and Grass Wonder.
